evals.prompt: Write requirements for a user notification system. Users should receive in-app, email, and push notifications for events like new comments, task assignments, and due date reminders. Include user preferences for notification channels.
evals.expected_output: PRD with user stories, acceptance criteria, business rules, NFRs, scope boundaries

assertions.name: user_stories
assertions.description: Stories in As a/I want/So that format with IDs

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Given/When/Then criteria per story

assertions.name: scope_boundaries
assertions.description: In-scope and out-of-scope lists

assertions.name: business_rules
assertions.description: Rules for notification delivery, dedup, quiet hours

assertions.name: nfrs
assertions.description: Non-functional requirements (delivery latency, reliability)

evals.prompt: Write a PRD for adding team collaboration features to our project management app. Needs: team creation, member invites via email, role-based access (owner, admin, member, viewer), shared workspaces, and activity feed.
evals.expected_output: PRD with role-specific user stories, permission matrix, and scope boundaries

assertions.name: role_specific_stories
assertions.description: Different stories for owner, admin, member, viewer roles

assertions.name: permission_matrix
assertions.description: Table showing what each role can do

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Testable criteria per story

assertions.name: edge_cases
assertions.description: Edge cases identified (invite expired, last owner leaving)

assertions.name: priorities
assertions.description: Stories prioritized P0/P1/P2

evals.prompt: Generate requirements for a CSV import feature. Users upload CSV files with product data (up to 100K rows). Need column mapping, validation, duplicate detection, progress tracking, and error reporting.
evals.expected_output: Requirements covering upload, parsing, validation, dedup, progress, and error handling

assertions.name: user_stories
assertions.description: Stories for upload, mapping, validation, import, error review

assertions.name: business_rules
assertions.description: Rules for dedup handling (skip/overwrite/merge), file size limits, allowed formats

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Testable criteria including error scenarios

assertions.name: nfrs
assertions.description: Performance requirements for 100K row processing

assertions.name: scope_boundaries
assertions.description: Explicit in/out of scope

evals.prompt: Write requirements for a multi-tenant billing system with Stripe integration. Needs subscription plans (free, pro, enterprise), usage-based billing for API calls, invoice generation, and a billing admin dashboard.
evals.expected_output: Requirements with billing-specific business rules, plan definitions, and compliance considerations

assertions.name: user_stories
assertions.description: Stories for subscribing, upgrading, viewing invoices, admin management

assertions.name: business_rules
assertions.description: Proration rules, dunning flow, usage metering

assertions.name: plan_definitions
assertions.description: Free/Pro/Enterprise plans with feature comparison

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Payment-specific criteria (successful charge, failed payment, refund)

assertions.name: scope_boundaries
assertions.description: What's in scope vs out (e.g., no crypto payments, no custom enterprise contracts)

evals.prompt: Write requirements for a search feature across products, orders, and users. Need full-text search, filters, autocomplete, and recent search history. The app uses NestJS + PostgreSQL.
evals.expected_output: Search requirements with per-entity search specs, filter definitions, and performance targets

assertions.name: user_stories
assertions.description: Stories for searching, filtering, autocomplete, and history

assertions.name: per_entity_search
assertions.description: Defines searchable fields per entity (products, orders, users)

assertions.name: filter_specs
assertions.description: Available filters with types (range, select, date)

assertions.name: nfrs
assertions.description: Response time targets (<200ms), result relevance expectations

assertions.name: acceptance_criteria
assertions.description: Testable criteria for search accuracy and edge cases (empty results, special chars)
